'''ây-l-zh''' ('''kayalazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polyglutamylate|polyglutamylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polyglutamylate|polyglutamylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kayalazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyalazh|thiyalazh]] || [[word:jiyalazh|jiyalazh]] || [[word:shiyalazh|shiyalazh]] || [[word:kiyalazh|kiyalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyalazh|thuthuyalazh]] || [[word:jujuyalazh|jujuyalazh]] || [[word:shushuyalazh|shushuyalazh]] || [[word:kukuyalazh|kukuyalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyalazh|thuyalazh]] || [[word:juyalazh|juyalazh]] || [[word:shuyalazh|shuyalazh]] || [[word:kuyalazh|kuyalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyalazh|thuyalazh]] || [[word:juyalazh|juyalazh]] || [[word:shuyalazh|shuyalazh]] || [[word:kuyalazh|kuyalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyalazh|theyalazh]] || [[word:jeyalazh|jeyalazh]] || [[word:sheyalazh|sheyalazh]] || [[word:keyalazh|keyalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyalazh|thothoyalazh]] || [[word:jojoyalazh|jojoyalazh]] || [[word:shoshoyalazh|shoshoyalazh]] || [[word:kokoyalazh|kokoyalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyalazh|thoyalazh]] || [[word:joyalazh|joyalazh]] || [[word:shoyalazh|shoyalazh]] || [[word:koyalazh|koyalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyalazh|thoyalazh]] || [[word:joyalazh|joyalazh]] || [[word:shoyalazh|shoyalazh]] || [[word:koyalazh|koyalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyalazh|thĂŠyalazh]] || [[word:jĂŠyalazh|jĂŠyalazh]] || [[word:shĂŠyalazh|shĂŠyalazh]] || [[word:kĂŠyalazh|kĂŠyalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayalazh|thathayalazh]] || [[word:jajayalazh|jajayalazh]] || [[word:shashayalazh|shashayalazh]] || [[word:kakayalazh|kakayalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayalazh|thayalazh]] || [[word:jayalazh|jayalazh]] || [[word:shayalazh|shayalazh]] || [[word:kayalazh|kayalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayalazh|thayalazh]] || [[word:jayalazh|jayalazh]] || [[word:shayalazh|shayalazh]] || [[word:kayalazh|kayalazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayalazh|shayalazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayalazh|goshayalazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayalazh|gokishayalazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayalazhnĂŒ|shayalazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayalazhnknĂŒ|goshayalazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalazhnĂŒ|gokishayalazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayalazhshĂ«|shayalazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkshĂ«|goshayalazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayalazhshĂ«|gokishayalazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalazhro|shayalazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkro|goshayalazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalazhro|gokishayalazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalazhmu|shayalazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkmu|goshayalazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalazhmu|gokishayalazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayalazhsher|shayalazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayalazhnksher|goshayalazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayalazhsher|gokishayalazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayalazhng|shayalazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkng|goshayalazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayalazhng|gokishayalazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayalazhya|shayalazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkya|goshayalazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayalazhya|gokishayalazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayalazhyam|shayalazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkyam|goshayalazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayalazhyam|gokishayalazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalazhnĂŒshĂ«|shayalazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayalazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayalazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalazhnĂŒro|shayalazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalazhnknĂŒro|goshayalazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalazhnĂŒro|gokishayalazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalazhnĂŒmu|shayalazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalazhnknĂŒmu|goshayalazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalazhnĂŒmu|gokishayalazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shayalazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayalazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayalazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalazhshĂ«ro|shayalazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkshĂ«ro|goshayalazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalazhshĂ«ro|gokishayalazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalazhshĂ«mu|shayalazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkshĂ«mu|goshayalazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalazhshĂ«mu|gokishayalazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalazhronĂŒ|shayalazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkronĂŒ|goshayalazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalazhronĂŒ|gokishayalazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalazhroshĂ«|shayalazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkroshĂ«|goshayalazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalazhroshĂ«|gokishayalazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalazhromu|shayalazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkromu|goshayalazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalazhromu|gokishayalazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalazhmunĂŒ|shayalazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkmunĂŒ|goshayalazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalazhmunĂŒ|gokishayalazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalazhmushĂ«|shayalazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkmushĂ«|goshayalazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalazhmushĂ«|gokishayalazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalazhmuro|shayalazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalazhnkmuro|goshayalazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalazhmuro|gokishayalazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
